description: Communal list (record #19) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 7v-8r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Undated, but surrounding entries are circa 1560 CE. The list includes four headings denoting specific subsections. The first heading is quite damaged, so its purpose is unclear in naming Karaite community members across 47 entries. Unlike the list from the previous page of residents living in communal qodesh properties, there are no Rabbanite Jews mentioned. Given that the following two sections on the same page relate to charitable institutions, this first section may depict contributions to the poor. The two subsequent charitable sections are titled: "houses of the poor" and "record (lit. paper) of the poor deserving (charity)." The final section of the list names the cantors of the Karaite community and, in some cases, their stipends. MCD.
description_he: רשימה קהילתית (רשומה #19) בפנקס בית דין קראי בקהיר (דפים 7ב-8א של ייבר-ערב. I 328). לא מתוארך, כ-1560 לספירה. הרשימה כוללת ארבעה כותרות לחלקים משנה: ניתן שבני הקהילה הקראית עם 47 ערכים, 'בתי העניים', 'פתק העניים הראויים (לצדקה)' ורשימת חזנים הקראיים ומשכורותיהם
